flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Arizona Western College fell 41% between 2009 and 2010 (17.8% → 10.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Arizona Western College fell 22% between 2007 and 2010 (21.0% → 16.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Arizona Western College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (7.4k → 6.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arizona Western College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
